text:
The Lai Dynasty (, Rai Ōchō) was a regime from some unknown time and location. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 100 

Background

The Lai Dynasty once created numerous Celadon Porcelain Vases. In modern times, only one is left still intact. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The last intact Celadon Porcelain Vase from the Lai Dynasty is auctioned off at the Underground Auction.
